entity.label: Sirion
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A breastplate, the Sidonian name of Hermon (q.v.), Deut. 3:9; Ps. 29:6.

nodes.label: Sirion
nodes.description: A breastplate, the Sidonian name of Hermon (q.v.), Deut. 3:9; Ps. 29:6.

verses.text: (Which Hermon the Sidonians call Sirion; and the Amorites call it Shenir;)
He maketh them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young unicorn.
Will a man leave the snow of Lebanon which cometh from the rock of the field? or shall the cold flowing waters that come from another place be forsaken?
